about.title: About Us | 9ja News Pluse
about.description: Learn about 9ja News — your trusted source for breaking news, politics, sports, and trending stories in Nigeria.

content_sections.heading: About 9ja News Pluse
content_sections.text: 9ja News pluse is a fast-growing digital media platform focused on delivering accurate, timely, and engaging news stories from Nigeria and around the world. We cover a wide range of topics including politics, sports, entertainment, business, and trending stories that matter to everyday Nigerians.

content_sections.heading: Our Vision
content_sections.text: To become one of Nigeria’s most trusted online news platforms by delivering high-quality journalism and real-time updates.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | 9ja News Pluse
privacy.description: Privacy Policy for 9ja News Pluse. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We may collect non-personal information such as browser type, device, and pages visited to improve user experience.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies to enhance your experience. You can disable cookies through your browser settings.

authors.name: Ifeanyi Clement Okoye
authors.bio: Ifeanyi Clement Okoye is a Nigerian-based writer and publisher at 9ja News. He covers breaking news, politics, sports, and entertainment with a focus on clarity, speed, and accuracy for digital audiences.

seo.title: Ifeanyi Clement Okoye | Author at 9ja News Pluse
seo.description: Ifeanyi Clement Okoye is an author and publisher at 9ja News covering politics, sports, entertainment, and breaking news in Nigeria.
